여호수아 12:1.content: Now these are the kings of the land, whom the children of Israel struck, and possessed their land beyond the Jordan toward the sunrise, from the valley of the Arnon to Mount Hermon, and all the Arabah eastward:

여호수아 12:2.content: Sihon king of the Amorites, who lived in Heshbon, and ruled from Aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of the Arnon, and the middle of the valley, and half Gilead, even to the river Jabbok, the border of the children of Ammon;

여호수아 12:3.content: and the Arabah to the sea of Chinneroth, eastward, and to the sea of the Arabah, even the Salt Sea, eastward, the way to Beth Jeshimoth; and on the south, under the slopes of Pisgah:

여호수아 12:4.content: and the border of Og king of Bashan, of the remnant of the Rephaim, who lived at Ashtaroth and at Edrei,

여호수아 12:5.content: and ruled in Mount Hermon, and in Salecah, and in all Bashan, to the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and half Gilead, the border of Sihon king of Heshbon.

여호수아 12:6.content: Moses the servant of Yahweh and the children of Israel struck them. Moses the servant of Yahweh gave it for a possession to the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh.

여호수아 12:7.content: These are the kings of the land whom Joshua and the children of Israel struck beyond the Jordan westward, from Baal Gad in the valley of Lebanon even to Mount Halak, that goes up to Seir. Joshua gave it to the tribes of Israel for a possession according to their divisions;

여호수아 12:8.content: in the hill country, and in the lowland, and in the Arabah, and in the slopes, and in the wilderness, and in the South; the Hittite, the Amorite, and the Canaanite, the Perizzite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite:

여호수아 12:9.content: the king of Jericho, one; the king of Ai, which is beside Bethel, one;

여호수아 12:10.content: the king of Jerusalem, one; the king of Hebron, one;

여호수아 12:11.content: the king of Jarmuth, one; the king of Lachish, one;

여호수아 12:12.content: the king of Eglon, one; the king of Gezer, one;

여호수아 12:13.content: the king of Debir, one; the king of Geder, one;

여호수아 12:14.content: the king of Hormah, one; the king of Arad, one;

여호수아 12:15.content: the king of Libnah, one; the king of Adullam, one;

여호수아 12:16.content: the king of Makkedah, one; the king of Bethel, one;

여호수아 12:17.content: the king of Tappuah, one; the king of Hepher, one;

여호수아 12:18.content: the king of Aphek, one; the king of Lassharon, one;

여호수아 12:19.content: the king of Madon, one; the king of Hazor, one;

여호수아 12:20.content: the king of Shimron Meron, one; the king of Achshaph, one;

여호수아 12:21.content: the king of Taanach, one; the king of Megiddo, one;

여호수아 12:22.content: the king of Kedesh, one; the king of Jokneam in Carmel, one;

여호수아 12:23.content: the king of Dor in the height of Dor, one; the king of Goiim in Gilgal, one;

여호수아 12:24.content: the king of Tirzah, one: all the kings thirty-one.
